structured_lts.competency_definition: The ability to apply counting principles, combinatorial reasoning, and systematic selection methods to determine possible arrangements and choices.
structured_lts.lt_definition: I can calculate combinations and permutations using standard counting principles.

level_statements.y6: I can count simple arrangements and selections using organized lists.
level_statements.y7: I can apply basic counting principles to find permutations and combinations.
level_statements.y8: I can calculate combinations and permutations using standard counting principles.

structured_lts.competency_definition: The ability to perform arithmetic operations with fractional numbers using proper procedures and computational fluency.
structured_lts.lt_definition: I can perform calculations with fractions using all four operations.

level_statements.y6: I can add and subtract fractions with like denominators.
level_statements.y7: I can multiply and divide fractions using standard procedures.
level_statements.y8: I can perform calculations with fractions using all four operations.

structured_lts.competency_definition: The ability to categorize decimal representations by their patterns and understand the mathematical characteristics of different decimal types.
structured_lts.lt_definition: I can classify decimal fractions and describe their mathematical properties.

level_statements.y6: I can identify finite and infinite decimal patterns.
level_statements.y7: I can distinguish between repeating and non-repeating decimal patterns.
level_statements.y8: I can classify decimal fractions and describe their mathematical properties.

structured_lts.competency_definition: The ability to apply systematic rounding procedures to approximate numbers according to specified precision requirements.
structured_lts.lt_definition: I can apply rounding rules to specified decimal places.

level_statements.y6: I can round whole numbers to nearest ten or hundred.
level_statements.y7: I can round decimal numbers to one decimal place.
level_statements.y8: I can apply rounding rules to specified decimal places.

structured_lts.competency_definition: The ability to manipulate exponential expressions by applying the fundamental laws and properties of positive integer powers.
structured_lts.lt_definition: I can apply properties of powers with positive integer exponents.

level_statements.y6: I can calculate simple powers using repeated multiplication.
level_statements.y7: I can apply basic power rules for multiplication and division.
level_statements.y8: I can apply properties of powers with positive integer exponents.

structured_lts.competency_definition: The ability to recognize and distinguish the defining characteristics and structural properties of different number systems.
structured_lts.lt_definition: I can identify properties of natural, integer, rational, and real numbers.

level_statements.y6: I can identify natural numbers and their basic properties.
level_statements.y7: I can distinguish between integers and rational numbers.
level_statements.y8: I can identify properties of natural, integer, rational, and real numbers.

structured_lts.competency_definition: The ability to decompose composite numbers into their prime components using algorithmic factorization techniques.
structured_lts.lt_definition: I can find prime factorizations using systematic decomposition methods.

level_statements.y6: I can identify factors of small composite numbers.
level_statements.y7: I can find prime factors using division methods.
level_statements.y8: I can find prime factorizations using systematic decomposition methods.

structured_lts.competency_definition: The ability to analyze mathematical relationships between sets by identifying their input and output components.
structured_lts.lt_definition: I can identify the domain and range of mappings between sets.

level_statements.y6: I can identify inputs and outputs in simple number patterns.
level_statements.y7: I can find domain and range from simple mappings.
level_statements.y8: I can identify the domain and range of mappings between sets.

structured_lts.competency_definition: The ability to compute statistical measures that describe the central tendency and distribution characteristics of numerical data.
structured_lts.lt_definition: I can calculate mean, mode, and median from numerical datasets.

level_statements.y6: I can find the mode from simple data sets.
level_statements.y7: I can calculate mean and median from small datasets.
level_statements.y8: I can calculate mean, mode, and median from numerical datasets.

structured_lts.competency_definition: The ability to compute proportional frequencies and understand their mathematical connection to theoretical probability concepts.
structured_lts.lt_definition: I can calculate relative frequencies and explain their probability connection.

level_statements.y6: I can count frequencies in simple data collections.
level_statements.y7: I can calculate basic relative frequencies from data.
level_statements.y8: I can calculate relative frequencies and explain their probability connection.

structured_lts.competency_definition: The ability to understand and apply the geometric principles governing reflection transformations and symmetry relationships.
structured_lts.lt_definition: I can identify properties of axial reflection including symmetry lines.

level_statements.y6: I can identify simple lines of symmetry in shapes.
level_statements.y7: I can reflect shapes across horizontal and vertical lines.
level_statements.y8: I can identify properties of axial reflection including symmetry lines.

structured_lts.competency_definition: The ability to recognize, categorize, and classify multi-sided geometric figures according to their structural attributes.
structured_lts.lt_definition: I can identify and classify polygons by their defining characteristics.

level_statements.y6: I can name basic polygons by counting their sides.
level_statements.y7: I can identify polygon properties and classify by characteristics.
level_statements.y8: I can identify and classify polygons by their defining characteristics.

structured_lts.competency_definition: The ability to apply mathematical formulas relating polygon angles and diagonals to solve geometric problems systematically.
structured_lts.lt_definition: I can apply angle sum and diagonal formulas to polygon problems.

level_statements.y6: I can find angle sums in triangles and quadrilaterals.
level_statements.y7: I can count diagonals and apply angle formulas to pentagons.
level_statements.y8: I can apply angle sum and diagonal formulas to polygon problems.

structured_lts.competency_definition: The ability to recognize and understand the fundamental mathematical connections between triangle sides and angles.
structured_lts.lt_definition: I can identify fundamental relationships between triangle sides and angles.

level_statements.y6: I can identify that triangles have three sides and angles.
level_statements.y7: I can recognize that larger angles oppose longer sides.
level_statements.y8: I can identify fundamental relationships between triangle sides and angles.

structured_lts.competency_definition: The ability to solve linear equations by systematically applying inverse operations to isolate the unknown variable.
structured_lts.lt_definition: I can solve first-degree equations using inverse operations systematically.

level_statements.y6: I can solve simple equations like x + 3 = 7.
level_statements.y7: I can solve equations involving multiplication and division steps.
level_statements.y8: I can solve first-degree equations using inverse operations systematically.

structured_lts.competency_definition: The ability to accurately represent ordered pairs as points within coordinate plane systems using proper plotting techniques.
structured_lts.lt_definition: I can plot number pairs accurately on coordinate systems.

level_statements.y6: I can plot points in the first quadrant only.
level_statements.y7: I can plot points using positive and negative coordinates.
level_statements.y8: I can plot number pairs accurately on coordinate systems.

structured_lts.competency_definition: The ability to recognize, apply, and construct geometric figures using both point and line symmetry principles.
structured_lts.lt_definition: I can apply point and axial symmetry to construct shapes.

level_statements.y6: I can identify symmetrical shapes in simple figures.
level_statements.y7: I can create shapes with one line of symmetry.
level_statements.y8: I can apply point and axial symmetry to construct shapes.

structured_lts.competency_definition: The ability to compute perimeter and area measurements for various quadrilaterals and triangles using appropriate geometric formulas.
structured_lts.lt_definition: I can calculate perimeter and area for various quadrilaterals and triangles.

level_statements.y6: I can find perimeter and area of rectangles and squares.
level_statements.y7: I can calculate area of triangles and parallelograms.
level_statements.y8: I can calculate perimeter and area for various quadrilaterals and triangles.

structured_lts.competency_definition: The ability to compute three-dimensional measurements for prisms by applying volume and surface area formulas accurately.
structured_lts.lt_definition: I can calculate surface area and volume of rectangular and triangular prisms.

level_statements.y6: I can find volume of rectangular prisms using length times width times height.
level_statements.y7: I can calculate surface area by finding areas of all faces.
level_statements.y8: I can calculate surface area and volume of rectangular and triangular prisms.

structured_lts.competency_definition: The ability to recognize, categorize, and analyze geometric shapes through their fundamental properties and characteristics.
structured_lts.lt_definition: I can classify triangles and quadrilaterals by identifying their defining geometric properties.

level_statements.y6: I can identify basic triangles and quadrilaterals using simple properties like sides and angles.
level_statements.y7: I can classify triangles and quadrilaterals using multiple properties including symmetry and angle relationships.
level_statements.y8: I can classify triangles and quadrilaterals by identifying their defining geometric properties.

structured_lts.competency_definition: The ability to perform and analyze geometric transformations using coordinate systems and mathematical rules.
structured_lts.lt_definition: I can apply point reflection transformations using coordinate rules to determine image coordinates.

level_statements.y6: I can perform simple point reflections on a coordinate grid using basic patterns.
level_statements.y7: I can apply point reflection transformations using coordinate rules to find image points.
level_statements.y8: I can apply point reflection transformations using coordinate rules to determine image coordinates and verify properties.

structured_lts.competency_definition: The ability to investigate and establish mathematical relationships between geometric properties of specialized quadrilaterals.
structured_lts.lt_definition: I can identify properties and derive relationships for parallelograms, trapezoids, and deltoids.

level_statements.y6: I can identify basic properties of parallelograms, trapezoids, and deltoids using visual features.
level_statements.y7: I can identify properties and simple relationships for parallelograms, trapezoids, and deltoids.
level_statements.y8: I can identify properties and derive relationships for parallelograms, trapezoids, and deltoids using geometric principles.

structured_lts.competency_definition: The ability to recognize and understand the specialized line segments and their roles within triangular geometry.
structured_lts.lt_definition: I can identify special lines in triangles by their geometric properties and relationships.

level_statements.y6: I can identify basic special lines in triangles like height and median.
level_statements.y7: I can identify special lines in triangles and describe their basic properties.
level_statements.y8: I can identify special lines in triangles by their geometric properties and relationships.

structured_lts.competency_definition: The ability to execute geometric transformations systematically using mathematical rules and coordinate calculations.
structured_lts.lt_definition: I can apply geometric transformations using coordinate rules and calculate resulting image coordinates.

level_statements.y6: I can apply simple geometric transformations using basic coordinate patterns and rules.
level_statements.y7: I can apply geometric transformations using coordinate rules to find image coordinates.
level_statements.y8: I can apply geometric transformations using coordinate rules and calculate resulting image coordinates.

structured_lts.competency_definition: The ability to examine mathematical statements and evaluate their logical structure, truth conditions, and conditional relationships.
structured_lts.lt_definition: I can analyze the logical structure and truth value of mathematical statements using conditional reasoning.

level_statements.y6: I can identify true and false mathematical statements using simple if-then structures.
level_statements.y7: I can determine truth values of mathematical statements and explain conditional relationships.
level_statements.y8: I can analyze the logical structure and truth value of mathematical statements using conditional reasoning.

structured_lts.competency_definition: The ability to examine proportional relationships through coordinate systems and interpret their graphical characteristics.
structured_lts.lt_definition: I can analyse proportional relationships using coordinate systems and graphical representations.

level_statements.y6: I can identify proportional relationships and plot points on coordinate grids.
level_statements.y7: I can compare proportional relationships using coordinates and simple graphical representations.
level_statements.y8: I can analyse proportional relationships using coordinate systems and graphical representations.

structured_lts.competency_definition: The ability to interpret and analyze graphical data displays to extract meaningful patterns and draw supported conclusions.
structured_lts.lt_definition: I can analyse graphical data representations to identify patterns and draw evidence-based conclusions.

level_statements.y6: I can read data from graphs and identify basic patterns.
level_statements.y7: I can interpret graphical data and describe patterns with simple reasoning.
level_statements.y8: I can analyse graphical data representations to identify patterns and draw evidence-based conclusions.

structured_lts.competency_definition: The ability to examine triangle congruence through systematic application of geometric reasoning and proof strategies.
structured_lts.lt_definition: I can analyse triangle congruence relationships using multiple geometric reasoning strategies.

level_statements.y6: I can identify congruent triangles using visual comparison and basic properties.
level_statements.y7: I can determine triangle congruence using side and angle measurements.
level_statements.y8: I can analyse triangle congruence relationships using multiple geometric reasoning strategies.

structured_lts.competency_definition: The ability to manipulate symbolic mathematical representations through systematic operations, substitution procedures, and adherence to established computational sequences.
structured_lts.lt_definition: I can perform operations with algebraic expressions using order of operations and substitution.

level_statements.y6: I can substitute numbers into simple expressions and calculate using basic order of operations.
level_statements.y7: I can expand brackets and perform operations with algebraic expressions following correct order of operations.
level_statements.y8: I can perform operations with algebraic expressions using order of operations and substitution.

structured_lts.competency_definition: The ability to translate real-world scenarios into mathematical language and solve problems using algebraic representations.
structured_lts.lt_definition: I can analyse word problems and construct algebraic equations.

level_statements.y6: I can solve simple word problems using basic equations.
level_statements.y7: I can translate word problems into equations with one variable.
level_statements.y8: I can analyse word problems and construct algebraic equations.

structured_lts.competency_definition: The capacity to examine and calculate percentage relationships across varying mathematical contexts and problem types.
structured_lts.lt_definition: I can analyze percentage values, rates, and base amounts.

level_statements.y6: I can find percentage values and calculate simple percentages.
level_statements.y7: I can determine percentages, rates, and base amounts in problems.
level_statements.y8: I can analyze percentage values, rates, and base amounts in contexts.

structured_lts.competency_definition: The skill to examine visual and tabular data representations to discover underlying mathematical connections and rules.
structured_lts.lt_definition: I can analyse patterns in graphs and tables.

level_statements.y6: I can identify simple patterns in tables and graphs.
level_statements.y7: I can find patterns and relationships in data displays.
level_statements.y8: I can analyse patterns in graphs and tables to identify relationships.
